title: Shabab emraa
director: Salah Abouseif, Ahmad El-Sabawi, Amin Yousseff Ghurab
writer: Salah Abouseif, Sayid Bidir, Amin Youssef Ghurab
plot: A young man from the country arrives in Cairo to finish his education. His landlady, a widow and successful businesswoman in the quarter of the Citadel, seduces him. Although she teaches him much about life she also makes him forg...
